**Apache Flink Documentation**

#  Apache Flink Documentation #

**Apache Flink** is a framework and distributed processing engine for stateful computations over _unbounded_ and _bounded_ data streams. Flink has been designed to run in _all common cluster environments_ , perform computations at _in-memory_ speed and at _any scale_.

###  Try Flink #

If you’re interested in playing around with Flink, try one of our tutorials:

  * [Flink SQL Tutorial](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/getting-started/quickstart-sql/>) \- Interactive queries with the SQL Client
  * [Table API Tutorial](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/getting-started/table_api/>) \- Declarative streaming with a relational API
  * [DataStream API Tutorial](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/getting-started/datastream/>) \- Imperative, event-driven stream processing
  * [Operations Playground](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/getting-started/flink-operations-playground/>) \- Explore Flink in Docker

###  Learn Flink #

  * To dive in deeper, the [Hands-on Training](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/learn-flink/overview/>) includes a set of lessons and exercises that provide a step-by-step introduction to Flink.

  * The [Concepts](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/concepts/overview/>) section explains what you need to know about Flink before exploring the reference documentation.

###  Get Help with Flink #

If you get stuck, check out our [community support resources](<https://flink.apache.org/community.html>). In particular, Apache Flink’s user mailing list is consistently ranked as one of the most active of any Apache project, and is a great way to get help quickly.

###  Explore Flink #

The reference documentation covers all the details. Some starting points:

  * [Flink SQL](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/sql/overview/>)
  * [Table API](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/dev/table/overview/>)
  * [DataStream API](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/dev/datastream/overview/>)
  * [DataStream API (V2)](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/dev/datastream-v2/overview/>)

  * [Configuration](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/deployment/config/>)
  * [REST API](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/ops/rest_api/>)
  * [CLI](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/deployment/cli/>)

###  Deploy Flink #

Before putting your Flink job into production, read the [Production Readiness Checklist](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/ops/production_ready/>). For an overview of possible deployment targets, see [Clusters and Deployments](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/deployment/overview/>).

###  Upgrade Flink #

Release notes cover important changes between Flink versions. Please read them carefully if you plan to upgrade your Flink setup.

See the release notes for [Flink 2.3](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-2.3/>), [Flink 2.2](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-2.2/>), [Flink 2.1](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-2.1/>), [Flink 2.0](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-2.0/>), [Flink 1.20](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.20/>), [Flink 1.19](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.19/>), [Flink 1.18](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.18/>), [Flink 1.17](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.17/>), [Flink 1.16](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.16/>), [Flink 1.15](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.15/>), [Flink 1.14](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.14/>), [Flink 1.13](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.13/>), [Flink 1.12](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.12/>), [Flink 1.11](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.11/>), [Flink 1.10](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.10/>), [Flink 1.9](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.9/>), [Flink 1.8](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.8/>), or [Flink 1.7](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/release-notes/flink-1.7/>).
